name: wheelwise
description: A product and engineering decision skill pack for turning ideas into build/buy/reuse-aware execution plans.

interface.shortDescription: Plan product ideas through build, buy, reuse, fork, and reference decisions.
interface.longDescription: WheelWise is a multi-skill product decision pack that structures raw ideas, selects the delivery surface, reviews feasibility and risk, evaluates existing solutions, and produces Codex-ready execution plans.
defaultPrompt: Use $using-wheelwise to evaluate this product idea.
Use $using-wheelwise to decide what to build, buy, reuse, fork, or reference.
Use $using-wheelwise to create a Codex-ready execution plan.
